subject: auto-merge not active?
instructions: i've enabled auto-merge on the repo but the prs don't seem to get merged in automatically. check the auto-merge function if its working as expected
lastOutput:
ects.
`‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ`

Here's a summary of what was wrong and what I fixed:

**The bug**: `checkAutoMerge` in `server/dispatcher.ts` required `reviewDecision === 'APPROVED'` before merging. When your repo doesn't have required reviewers (or nobody has reviewed yet), GitHub returns `reviewDecision: ""` ‚Äî an empty string. So the merge condition was **always false**, and PRs never got auto-merged.

**The fix** (3 changes):
1. **Inverted the review logic** ‚Äî instead of requiring `APPROVED`, it now only blocks on `CHANGES_REQUESTED` or `REVIEW_REQUIRED`. Empty string (no reviews needed) passes through.
2. **Fixed a stale data race** ‚Äî `dispatcherTick` now re-reads the ticket from the DB before calling `checkAutoMerge`, preventing redundant merge attempts on already-merged PRs.
3. **Added diagnostic logging** ‚Äî when auto-merge doesn't trigger, you'll see exactly which condition failed in the server logs.

https://github.com/jess-bergs/agent-kanban/pull/15
